DISC_8DBAE4731A9E.manual_extracted_text: T5 Data Centers announced the construction of ATL IV, a 48MW hyperscale data center campus in Atlanta, Georgia. The facility is expected to draw power from Georgia Power under a large-load interconnection agreement filed in Q4 2024. Construction is scheduled for completion in Q3 2026.
DISC_8DBAE4731A9E.notes: copied from T5 press release PDF page 2
